title: TNT Equivalent
body:
**This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!**

---
Did you know that the TNT's Explosion power is 4, while Creeper's is 3; and making a TNT need 5 gunpowder items, while killing a creeper usually only gives you 0 to 2?Not EQUIVALENT!This simple datapack is gonna fix it.Now, a creeper will drop 3-4 gunpowder items when you kill it, this is an accurate result obtained through complicated calculation. :-)
